You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. Lalit Purohit is working in the department of IT at SGSITS Indore since May-2002. He has a good research experience of over 12 years. He pursued his Ph.D. from one of the India topmost engineering institute - Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee. He has guided around 60 UG projects, 15 PG Thesis and 02 PhD are under progress. He has contributed to the department and the institute by holding various responsibilities. Presently he is deputed as deputy controller of exams since Dec 2019. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 01 PhD Computer Engineering 2019 IIT Roorkee Work Experience: S. No. Designation Department Employer Name Duration of Employment 01 Lecturer IT SGSITS Indore May 2002 – Dec 2003 02 Assistant Professor IT SGSITS Indore Dec 2003 - Dec 2016 03 Associate Professor IT SGSITS Indore Dec 2016 - Present Research Details: He is working in the area of web services. My interest includes Web Service selection using Machine learning techniques Evolutionary computing for Web Services Semantic Web Service Information Retrieval Web & Information Security IoT PhD Supervision: S.No Candidate Area Status 01 Manoj Dhawan Security O (2019) 02 R. S. Daboria (QIP) Computer Vision O (2021) 03 Anil Kumar Information Retrieval O (2020) 04 Shadab Khan Web Services O (2022) Publications: Research and development Number of quality publications in refereed/SCI Journals, citations, International & National Journals and Conferences. Books/Book chapters etc: Research Papers Publication Number of quality publications in refereed/SCIE / Scopus Journals (National & International) for Academic Year 2021-22 Sr. No. Name Of Author Title Of The Paper Journal Name Impact Factor / CiteScore Year Of Publication Citation 1. 31st March, 2021 - Number of quality publications in refereed/SCIE / Scopus Journals (National & International) for Academic Year 2019-20 Sr. No. Name Of Author Title Of The Paper Journal Name Impact Factor / Cite Score Year Of Publication Citation 1 Dr. Lalit Purohit Web Services In The Internet Of Things And Smart Cities: A Case Study On Classification Techniques DOI: 10.1109/MCE.2018.2880808 IEEE Consumer Electronics Magazine 4.135 3/ 2019 19 Number of quality Book/ Book chapters for Academic Year 2019-20 Sr. No. Name Of Author Title Of The Book Book Chapter Book Publication Details Year Of Publication 1 Dr. Lalit Purohit Social Networking And Computational Intelligence Dynamic Web Service Composition Using AI Planning Technique: Case Study On Blackbox Planner DOI:https://doi.org/10.1007/978-981-15-2071-6_15 Springer ISBN: 978-981-15-2071-6 2020 Number of quality publications in Conferences (National & International) for Academic Year 2019-20 Sr. No. Name Of Author Title Of The Paper Conference Year Of Publication Citation 1 Dr. Lalit Purohit Clustering Based Approach For Web Service Selection Using Skyline Computations DOI:10.1109/ICWS.2019.00052 2019 IEEE International Conference On Web Services (ICWS), Itly, Milan July 2019 10 2 Dr. Lalit Purohit Web Service Classification Using Stacking DOI:10.1109/AiDAS47888.2019.8970755 2019 IEEE International Conference On Artificial Intelligence And Data Sciences (Aidas), Malaysia Sept 2019 1 3 Dr. Lalit Purohit Web Service Clustering On The Basis Of Qos Parameters DOI:10.1109/AiDAS47888.2019.8970785 2019 IEEE International Conference On Artificial Intelligence And Data Sciences (Aidas), Malaysia Sept 2019 - 4 Dr. Lalit Purohit Replaceability Based Web Service Selection Approach DOI: 10.1109/Hipc.2019.00024 2019 IEEE 26th International Conference On High Performance Computing, Data, And Analytics (Hipc) 2019/12/17 4 Number of quality publications in peered review journal (National & International) for Academic Year 2019-20 Sr. No. Name Of Author Title Of The Paper Journal Name Year Of Publication Citation 1 Dr. Lalit Purohit A Comparative Study On Qos-Based Web Service Selection Using GA, PSO And ACO DOI:10.18231/2454-9150.2019.0220 International Journal For Research In Engineering Application & Management Sept 2019 - Projects: Completed AICTE MODROB’s project (Sanctioned Grant of Rs 18,80,000) F.Y. 2013-14. Testing & Consultancy: Member, Panel of consultant, SBI (main branch ) Y. N. Road Indore (MP) – 2008-2010. Member, Panel of consultant, Smart Traffic Management, Smart city development Authority, Indore (MP) - 2019-till date Other Details: 1. List of Conferences/Workshops/Seminars Organized One day expert lecture on “Software development using Agile Methodology”, 05/12/2020, organized by Department of IT, SGSITS Indore. One week FDP on “Introduction to Machine Learning and Data Engineering”, Organized by Deptt of IT, SGSITS Indore & IIITDMJ, from 20-24, Dec 2019. 24 Hour Hackathon (HackIndore) 28-29, Sept 2018 & 03-04, Oct 2019, organized by Deptt of IT, SGSITS Indore (#Include students club). One day workshop on “XML For Industry”, 27/01/2018, organized by Department of IT & TEQIP-II, SGSITS Indore. One day expert lecture on “Role of Parallel Graph algorithms in Software Development”, 28/12/2013, organized by department of IT, SGSITS Indore. One day expert lecture on “Role of web services in Web based softwares and tools”, 03/09/2011, organized by department of IT, SGSITS Indore One day expert lecture on “Dynamic content generation using PHP”, 24/01/2009, Orgnaized by Department of IT, SGSITS Indore. 2. Invited Lectures/Expert Talks/Chairmanships at Conferences Technical Committee Member , 2nd International Conference on Technological Innovations in Engineering and Management (ICTIEM-21), 30th - 31st March 2021. PC Member at NLPaSE 2020 : 1st Workshop on Natural Language Processing Advancements for Software Engineering (NLPaSE) Colocated with 27th APSEC 2020 Session Chair (Computer-IT Track), MPCST Young Scientist Congress Held at SGSITS Indore, 27-28, Feb 2020 . Invited lecture in FDP on “Introduction to Machine Learning and Data Engineering”, Dec 2019 held at SGSITS Indore. Reviewer in international Journals and conferences of repute. Session Chair in international conference on Data Analytics and Computational Techniques (ICDACT) - 2021. 3. Other Information 1.
